name: teams-domain-store
description: Create teams domain store with ArkType scope defining Organization, Team, Membership, App, Invitation entities and enhancement hooks for computed views and permission resolution
acceptanceCriteria: TeamsDomain ArkType scope defines Organization, Team, Membership, App, Invitation entities
Entity identifiers use 'string.uuid' type for proper MST reference resolution
Team.organizationId references Organization, Team.parentId optionally references Team (self-reference)
Membership has polymorphic optional refs: organizationId?, teamId? (exactly one set)
App.teamId references Team, Invitation has polymorphic refs like Membership
Role enum values defined: owner, admin, member, viewer
createTeamsStore() factory uses createStoreFromScope with enhancement hooks
enhanceModels adds Membership.level computed view (numeric role value: owner=40, admin=30, member=20, viewer=10)
enhanceModels adds Invitation.isExpired computed view (expiresAt < Date.now())
enhanceRootStore adds initialize() action that loads all collections
enhanceRootStore adds resolvePermissions(userId, resourceType, resourceId) that walks team hierarchy for max role
Reference fields resolve to entity instances (not just ID strings)
Optional references return undefined when not set
